3262660.name: Fallen: Into the Darkness
3262660.description:
Fallen: Into the Darkness is just another platform game, one where rage quitting and the temptation to uninstall are all too familiar. It’s free, but are you patient enough to beat it at least once? As you descend deeper, the game becomes more challenging, and every second counts. Keep your light alive, adapt quickly, and try to reach the end.

Key Features:

  • Procedural Generation: Each level reshapes itself with every death, offering a fresh challenge every time you play.

  • Light Mechanics: Keep your light alive to survive the descent. Don’t let it go out, or you’ll be lost in the darkness.

  • Challenging Platforming: Overcome platforms and obstacles that demand precise timing and careful decision-making.

  • Single-player Experience: Play solo and focus on your skill to conquer the ever-changing levels.

  • Free-to-Play: Dive into the game without spending a penny, with the option to support development via donations.

Each step counts, and every fall is a reminder that nothing is permanent. How long can you keep your light burning as you dive deeper into the darkness?
3262660.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
